prompt:
Can you explain what this legacy AutoPilot script does, step by step?

_PS_For projects
  _PS_For planograms
    _GN_If GetValue("Position","Capacity")=0 Then
      _PS_Delete position {Option="CurrentPosition"}
    _GN_End if
  _PS_End planograms
_PS_End projects

assertions.name: explains-overall-purpose
assertions.description: Explains the overall goal — removing or cleaning up zero-capacity positions across planograms

assertions.name: explains-for-projects-loop
assertions.description: Explains what the For projects loop does (iterates open or listed projects)

assertions.name: explains-getvalue-capacity-check
assertions.description: Explains what GetValue("Position","Capacity")=0 means in plain English

assertions.name: explains-delete-position
assertions.description: Explains what Delete position does (removes the position from the planogram)

assertions.name: plain-english-no-code-output
assertions.description: Response is explanatory prose — does not just produce converted C# code
